panel.strength: Correctly anchors the pathway to the one matching retrieved classification — POK / 21 CFR 892.2060 Class II CADx radiology software — and frames the claim as adjunctive rather than autonomous, which fits that class.

critiques.issue: No actual predicate device is identified; the plan proposes a 510(k) but cannot yet name a substantially-equivalent lung-imaging CADx predicate.
critiques.evidence_basis: The retrieved 510(k) records (K103706 outpatient ECG, K123671 outpatient management, K964021/K040829 vascular grafts, K940827 sunglasses) are none of them imaging CADx; the plan itself concedes no predicate was retrieved and the pipeline did not run a comprehensive predicate search.

critiques.issue: The primary intended-use / clinical claim is explicitly INFERRED and unconfirmed; a submission cannot proceed until the team locks the exact intended-use statement (adjunct risk-stratification vs. any biopsy-directing language).
critiques.evidence_basis: The plan's own 'Intended clinical claim (INFERRED — team must confirm)' flag; no retrieved record defines an intended use for this device class beyond the generic POK regulation.

critiques.issue: The auxiliary doubling-time regression is part of the device output but has no defined intended use or validation, which could inadvertently broaden the cleared claim.
critiques.evidence_basis: Plan states the doubling-time output requires separate validation; no retrieved record supports a growth-rate claim for this model.

panel.strength: Correctly recognizes that confirmed cancer count (not total nodule count) governs power given low malignancy prevalence, and requires MRMC reader/case random-effect variance components plus calibration slope/intercept reporting.

critiques.issue: No sample size, effect size, or expected cancer prevalence is specified; the study cannot be evaluated for adequate power as written.
critiques.evidence_basis: The plan defers N to a biostatistician and notes no retrieved record fixes a sample size for this indication; the only retrieved enrollment (NCT02780739, n=521) is an unrelated cognitive-training trial and is non-transferable.

critiques.issue: The primary metric relies on AUC/AUROC, but in a low-prevalence screening cohort discrimination via AUROC can mask poor positive predictive performance; AUPRC and PPV at the operating point should be pre-specified alongside calibration.
critiques.evidence_basis: The plan itself states malignancy prevalence in screen-detected indeterminate nodules is low; no retrieved benchmark establishes an acceptable AUROC/AUPRC target, so metric choice must be justified rather than assumed.

critiques.issue: Multi-site generalization is treated as 'ideally different centers' rather than required, weakening external validity of a physics-sensitive radiomics model.
critiques.evidence_basis: The plan hedges the geographic split as optional; no retrieved record characterizes this model's cross-site or cross-scanner robustness.

panel.strength: Explicitly ties validation to whether the model changes reader risk-stratification and tracks the upstream U-Net detector miss rate, acknowledging that a missed candidate is a silent false negative the classifier never sees.

critiques.issue: No operating point / acceptable false-positive or recall rate is defined, so the workflow impact — unnecessary biopsy referrals and alert/recall burden on the screening program — cannot be assessed.
critiques.evidence_basis: The plan references 'sensitivity at a fixed, clinically acceptable false-positive/recall rate' but no such threshold is set, and no retrieved benchmark supplies one.

critiques.issue: The doubling-time output is positioned as clinically useful (surveillance triage) but its lead-time actionability is not evaluated, risking action based on an unvalidated growth estimate.
critiques.evidence_basis: Plan defers doubling-time to separate volumetric validation; no retrieved record supports its clinical actionability.

critiques.issue: Silent/shadow-mode phase is proposed but has no criteria linking logged model behavior to a decision to proceed to live triage, leaving the go/no-go for real-world use undefined.
critiques.evidence_basis: Plan describes the shadow phase but specifies no exit criteria; no retrieved trial design maps this transition for the indication.

fix_before_submission: Conduct and document a formal 510(k) predicate search and name a substantially-equivalent lung-imaging CADx predicate before claiming the POK pathway.
Confirm and lock the exact intended-use statement (adjunctive risk-stratification, explicitly excluding autonomous or biopsy-directing language) with regulatory counsel.
Have a biostatistician compute powered sample size fixing effect size, expected cancer prevalence, reader count, and reference-standard noise before finalizing the study.
Pre-specify AUPRC and PPV at the operating point alongside AUROC and calibration, justified for the low-prevalence screening cohort.
Define the clinically acceptable operating point (false-positive / recall rate) and quantify the resulting biopsy-referral and workflow burden.
